text: DGA on T-013 shows methane and ethane elevated against a low CO2 background. Retrieve the on-file record, analyze it, and determine whether the gas signature is consistent with a low-temperature overheating pattern or a different thermal class.
characteristic_form: The answer should report the stored DGA gas concentrations for T-013, name the analyzer's thermal-pattern fault code or label, and state whether the signature matches low-temperature overheating with the supporting gas rationale.
